info.description:
Japanese language learning API — chapters, SRS flashcard reviews, quizzes, XP levelling, streaks, and in-app shop.
All successful responses are wrapped in {"data": ...}. Paginated responses also include {"meta": {...}}.
All error responses follow {"error": {"code": "...", "message": "..."}}.
info.title: FluentFox API

get.description: Returns platform-wide statistics (total users, active today, reviews, published chapters). Requires admin role.
Returns a paginated list of all users with admin-only fields. Requires admin role.

post.description: Bans a user account with a mandatory reason. Requires admin role.
Sends a password reset link to the email if an account exists. Always returns 200 to prevent email enumeration.
Authenticates credentials and returns access + refresh tokens.
Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new access + refresh token pair.
Creates a user account and sends an email verification link.
Resets the user's password using a one-time token from the reset email.

400.description: Token invalid, expired, or already used

post.description: Marks the user's email as verified using the token sent during registration.

400.description: Token invalid, expired, or already used

get.description: Returns a paginated list of published chapters, optionally filtered by JLPT level.
Returns a single chapter with its grammar concepts and cultural insights.
Returns a summary of the user's progress across all chapters and vocabulary.

post.description: Creates a new quiz session of the given type. Optionally scoped to a specific chapter.

parameters.description: Quiz type, optional chapter, card count
parameters.name: body

post.description: Submits an answer for one item in an active quiz session. Returns correctness and XP earned.
Marks the quiz session as completed and returns a summary with accuracy and total XP earned.

get.description: Returns all currently available items in the XP shop.
Returns all items the authenticated user has purchased.

post.description: Spends XP to purchase an item. Returns inventory ID of the new item.

get.description: Returns cards that are due for review today, ordered by due date. Limit defaults to the user's deck setting.

parameters.description: Maximum number of cards to return
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Returns counts of new cards and review cards due today.

post.description: Records a review rating (1=Again, 2=Hard, 3=Good, 4=Easy) and reschedules the card using the FSRS algorithm. Awards XP.

get.description: Returns the user's current and longest streak, freeze count, and whether the streak is alive today.
Returns the authenticated user's account details.

post.description: Changes the authenticated user's password after verifying the current one.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's public profile (display name, bio, JLPT goal).

patch.description: Updates display name, bio, native language, and/or JLPT goal.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's app preferences (daily XP goal, SRS card count, reminders).

patch.description: Updates one or more app preferences for the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns the user's total XP, current level, XP to next level, and progress percentage.
Returns the global XP leaderboard ranked by total XP.

refresh_token.description: raw opaque value sent to client
